top_signals.title: AI is outpacing the rules, Europe’s top bankers and regulators warn
top_signals.summary: Europe's top bankers and financial regulators are grappling with how to better regulate AI risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: IMF says policy choices will determine whether tokenization strengthens or fragments the financial system
top_signals.summary: The IMF's Tobias Adrian said risks could shift from banks toward market infrastructure providers and smart contracts as tokenization expands.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Carlyle Hires Banks for $400 Million India IPO of RCM Business
top_signals.summary: Carlyle Group Inc. has hired JM Financial Ltd. and Goldman Sachs Group Inc. to advise on a potential initial public offering of its India-based healthcare revenue cycle management business, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
